patch.value: Package scaffold generates a runnable sample test, .gitignore, and npm test script

As a pm package author, I want 'pm package init' to scaffold a runnable sample test (node:test + SDK testing helpers), a .gitignore, and an npm test script, so I can validate my package's command registration immediately without wiring up a test harness myself. The SDK already ships rich testing helpers (activateExtensionForTest, assertRegisteredCommandContract, etc.) but the scaffold never demonstrated them — closing the 'as easy as possible to create AND verify a package' gap. Package mode only (npm-installable root); extension-only scaffold stays minimal since it cannot npm-install the peer SDK.

value.note: Package-mode scaffold now emits index.test.js + .gitignore + npm test script

patch.value: next_steps includes 'npm install && npm test' validation step for package mode

value.note: Package-mode scaffold now emits index.test.js + .gitignore + npm test script

value.author: claude-code-agent
value.text: activateExtensionForTest only grants capabilities passed via options.capabilities OR an inline module.manifest.capabilities mirror — the on-disk manifest.json is NOT read. A scaffolded index.js with no inline manifest needs the test to pass capabilities:['commands'] or registerCommand is silently dropped (Available commands: (none)).

value.author: claude-code-agent
value.text: RegisteredExtensionCommandDefinition.name is the base command group (e.g. 'val-pkg'); the full command path lives in .command ('val-pkg ping') and the action slug in .action ('val-pkg-ping'). Assert command registration on .command, not .name.

value.author: claude-code-agent
value.text: Implemented + verified end-to-end: scaffolded a package in a temp dir, symlinked the built @unbrained/pm-cli, ran 'node --test' on the generated index.test.js → PASS against the real SDK testing helpers. Extension-only scaffold stays minimal (3 files: manifest.json/index.js/README.md) because it cannot npm-install the peer SDK. 100% coverage (30288 stmts/23669 branches) + docstring + static gates all green.

patch.value: Shipped package-mode scaffold sample test (node:test + SDK testing helpers), .gitignore, npm test script, README Validate section, and next_steps validation hint. Verified the generated test passes against the real SDK; extension-only scaffold unchanged.
